function.content:
---
record_type: outbound_email
created_at: 2026-03-30T10:47:00Z
send_state: draft
to:
  - claudia@helios-tax.example
subject: "Re: Invoice resend request"
attachments:
  - 50_finance/invoices/2025_12_18__eur_000520__inv_0006__helios_backfill_intake_audit.md
related_entities:
  - claudia
---
Hi Claudia,

Sure — I’ve attached the Helios Steuerbüro München GmbH invoice from 2025-12-18 (INV-0006) for your internal approval.

Best,
Miles

next_step.current_state: Outbound email record was written successfully; verification check: attachment path was previously read, single attachment ordering is trivially newest-first, recipient matches Claudia canonical email, no forwarded quoted text required, and subject with colon-space is correctly quoted. Next complete inbox workflow by deleting processed file.
next_step.observation: Created /60_outbox/outbox/eml_2026-03-30T10-47-00Z.md as a draft reply with the requested invoice attached.

next_step.current_state: Inbox item processed end-to-end: verified sender identity, verified requested invoice, created outbound draft, and deleted processed inbox file.
next_step.observation: Deleted /00_inbox/000_invoice-request.md after completing the requested resend workflow.

function.message: Processed the next inbox item successfully. I verified the sender as Claudia via canonical entity data, located the exact requested Helios invoice dated 2025-12-18, created an outbound email draft with that invoice attached at /60_outbox/outbox/eml_2026-03-30T10-47-00Z.md, and then removed the processed inbox file.
function.rulebook_notes: Followed mandatory bootstrap (tree, AGENTS, context), read nested AGENTS in each entered lane, used inbox-email and sending-email workflows, resolved sender via canonical primary_contact_email, and deleted inbox item only after full completion.
function.outcome_justification: Evidence shows the inbox sender 'claudia@helios-tax.example' matches canonical primary_contact_email in /10_entities/cast/claudia.md, and the requested invoice dated 2025-12-18 exists at /50_finance/invoices/2025_12_18__eur_000520__inv_0006__helios_backfill_intake_audit.md. Outbound draft was created in the required outbox location with exact attachment path, then the processed inbox file was deleted per workflow.
